Now in early access

Bookings managed.
Payments handled.

The simple tool for holiday rental owners who take direct bookings. Create a booking, share a link, and get paid via Stripe. Your guests pay zero fees — and so do you, until you earn.

Get Started Free See Pricing →
Payment received £1,250.00 via Stripe
Payments powered by
Zero guest fees
No subscription required
Who it's for

Built for owners who
do things themselves

If you own 1–5 holiday rental properties and take direct bookings, this is your tool. No PMS complexity, no OTA commissions.

Owners HQ is perfect if you…

  • Take direct bookings from listing sites, your own website, or repeat guests
  • Currently chase payments via bank transfer, PayPal, or phone calls
  • Find full PMS platforms too complex, too expensive, or just overkill
  • Want a professional payment experience for your guests without the overhead
  • Don't want to pay monthly fees during your off-season
How it works

Three steps. That's it.

Create a booking, share a link, and let us handle the payments.

1

Create a Booking

Add your guest's details, set the dates, and define a payment schedule — deposit and balance, or custom instalments.

2

Guest Gets a Link

Your guest receives an email with a link to their booking page. No app, no account — they just click and pay.

3

Payments, Handled

We send reminders, process payments via Stripe, and email receipts. You track everything from your dashboard.

Why Owners HQ

No complexity. No hidden costs.
Just a fair tool that works.

No Subscription Fees

Pay only when you take bookings. 1% of the booking value, £10 minimum, £25 cap. No monthly charges, ever.

Zero Guest Fees

Your guests pay nothing extra. No service fees, no booking fees, no hidden charges. The price you quote is the price they pay.

Every Feature Included

No tiers. No paywalls. No per-property charges. Every feature is available to every user from day one.

Automated Payment Reminders

Set your payment schedule and let us handle the rest. Reminders go out at the right time so you never have to chase guests.

Features

Everything you need,
nothing you don't

Purpose-built tools for managing direct bookings and collecting payments.

Booking Management

Create bookings, set payment schedules, and send professional confirmation emails automatically.

Learn more →

Guest Portal

Guests access their booking via email link. No app, no account, no password — they just click and pay.

Learn more →

Payment Processing

Stripe-powered payments with cards, bank transfers, and Apple Pay. Automated reminders and email receipts.

Learn more →

OTA Savings Dashboard

See exactly how much you're saving compared to Airbnb and other OTA commission fees, in real time.

Learn more →
Pricing

Pay when you earn.
Not before.

No subscription. No per-property fees. No off-season charges. Just a small fee when you process a booking.

1% per booking
£10 minimum fee
£25 maximum fee

Most owners pay between £10 and £25 per booking.
Compare that to 15–20% on Airbnb.

See Full Pricing Details

Ready to manage your
bookings smarter?

Join holiday rental owners who are taking control of their direct bookings and keeping more of their income.
